step_rationale: Cysteine oxidation metabolite; systemic redox and metabolic status marker independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: L-cysteine sulfinic acid reflects systemic oxidative stress and amino acid metabolism alterations in acute MI.

references.title: High-resolution metabolomics study revealing l-homocysteine sulfinic acid, cysteic acid, and carnitine as novel biomarkers for high acute myocardial infarction risk.
